summary: Continue Story Loop Optimization Testing Complete - All 5 parts verified: (1) StoryPreview.js has 'What Happens Next?' as PRIMARY header action with overlay, banner, sidebar CTAs, (2) PublicCreation.js post-video overlay shows cliffhanger text with Continue CTA, (3) StoryVideoPipeline.js remix_data handler captures hook_text and characters, (4) Backend planning_llm.py has cliffhanger enforcement logic (min 15 chars, LLM rewrite), (5) Homepage story cards show 'Continue Story' CTAs
critical_code_review_comments: StoryPreview.js handleContinueStory (lines 52-72) correctly passes hook_text: cliffhanger and characters: preview.characters in remix_data
StoryPreview.js header-continue-btn shows 'What Happens Next?' as PRIMARY action with gradient styling
StoryPreview.js ready-banner (lines 195-222) displays preview.cliffhanger text with Continue CTA
StoryPreview.js sidebar-continue-btn (lines 416-434) shows 'What Happens Next?' section above Downloads
StoryPreview.js last-scene-continue-btn (lines 268-276) shows purple arrow button that triggers overlay
StoryPreview.js scene-continue-overlay (lines 280-306) shows 'This wasn't the end...' with cliffhanger text
PublicCreation.js handleContinue (lines 124-167) passes hook_text: creation.cliffhanger and characters: creation.characters
PublicCreation.js post-video-overlay (lines 395-422) shows cliffhangerText with 'This wasn't the end...' message
PublicCreation.js cliffhangerText (line 237) extracts from creation.cliffhanger || lastScene?.narration || story_text
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 259-266) captures hook_text and characters from rd.remixFrom in remix_data handler
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 205-210) reads hook_text and characters from prefill object
planning_llm.py (lines 142-162) enforces cliffhanger with min 15 char check and LLM rewrite if weak/missing
Homepage shows 'Stories you can continue' section with 10+ 'Continue Story' buttons on story cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Continue Story Loop Optimization fully verified. All 5 parts working: StoryPreview has continue-first UX with overlay/banner/sidebar CTAs, PublicCreation overlay uses actual cliffhanger text, prefill data includes hook_text and characters, backend cliffhanger enforcement exists with 15-char minimum and LLM rewrite. Homepage shows 'Continue Story' CTAs on all story cards.
